nasb.text: The sons of Solomon’s servants: the sons of Sotai, the sons of Hassophereth, the sons of Peruda,

esv.text: The sons of Solomon’s servants: the sons of Sotai, the sons of Hassophereth, the sons of Peruda,

cnv.text: 所羅門僕人的子孫的數目記在下面：瑣太的子孫、瑣斐列的子孫、比路大的子孫、

ccb.text: 所罗门仆人的子孙有琐太的子孙、琐斐列的子孙、比路大的子孙、
